eligible_applicant_type: 501(c)(3) arts organizations in the foundation’s geographic giving area
geographic_restrictions: Greater Hartford area, including Hartford, Avon, Berlin, Bloomfield, East Granby, East Hartford, East Windsor, Ellington, Farmington, Glastonbury, Manchester, New Britain, Newington, Rocky Hill, Simsbury, South Windsor, Vernon, West Hartford, Wethersfield, Windsor, and Windsor Locks.
project_area: Visual and performing arts projects involving collaboration between an artist or artists and an arts organization.
demographic_requirements: Preference given to projects supporting artists of color in the Greater Hartford area.
eligibility_summary: Open to 501(c)(3) arts organizations in the Greater Hartford area. Artists must partner with an eligible organization to apply. Projects must involve new work creation, collaboration, and community benefit. Organizations may apply for either this grant or an Excellence in the Arts grant per calendar year.
